title: Always Sunny
body:
### About
Always Sunny is a Resourcepack that simply retextures sunflowers in a taller, more glorious, more square form. I made this Resourcepack because I don't think Minecraft's serves their true beauty justice.

This is one of my many projects (they're usually a lot bigger than this) if you want sneak peaks or just to chat come join my **[Discord Server !](https://discord.gg/DZnaNVr4FM)**

I am also willing to change the version of this Resourcepack if you need it for a specific Minecraft version, if you want that, message me on the Discord Server mentioned above
 


![Sunflower](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_8acd8649-a9e2-4505-bb64-c3fba8d17e7e.png)
